title: Entry-Level SEO Specialist at Titan Eyeplus

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level SEO Specialist at Titan Eyeplus
jsonLd.description:
Join the Titan Eyeplus family as a SEO Specialist in Chennai. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Titan Eyeplus:
Titan Eyeplus is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Develop and implement category growth strategies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in A/B Testing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Titan Eyeplus!
